titleStmt.title: SII 25.105: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 105. (A.R. No. 105 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.

This fragmentary record commences with the praśasti Tirumagaḷ-pōla, etc., of the above king. The first digit of the regnal year is lost. It may be either 1 or 2, in which case it may correspond to 1002-03 or 1012-13 A.D.

It seems to record that the sabhai of Tirupputtūr, a brahmadēya in Kēraḷaśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu met at uṟaṅgāppuḷi on the northern bank of Kaṟkuḷam and sold 1(1/4) śey, of land in favour of the deity Śrītaḷiparamēśvara.
There is a mutilated record adjascent to the above inscription of the reign of Rājēndrachōḷa. It may be assigned to Rājēndra I on the basis of a portion of the prāśasti which is available here.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī tirumakaḷ pola perunilac celviyum taṉaceka Urimaipūṇṭa maṉakkoḷa kāntaṉūr cālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkai nāṭum kaṅkapāṭiyum nuḷampa pāṭiyum taṭikai vaḻiyum kuṭamalai nāṭum kollamum kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai
Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟi taṇṭāl koṇṭataṉṉeḻil vaḷaryūḻiyuḷella yāṇṭum toḻutaka viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiṉārait tecukoḷ śrī kovirājarāja kecariparmarāṉa śrī rāja rāja devaṟkkuya
teṭṭāvatu Ivvāṇṭu keraḷaciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu brahmateyan=tirupputtūr sabhaiyom vāyiṟccāvūk kūṭṭikkuṟaivaṟaikaṟkuḷattu vaṭakarai Uṟaṅkāppuḷil kūṭiirun=tu sabhaiyom śrītaḷipa
ṭuttabhūmiyāvatu nam vaṭa paṭākai pāṟke kāle m Itaṉ kiḷkarai muṉ taṭi Uṭpaṭa Aḷavupaṭi Ikkāl ceyum viṟṟukkuṭuttom sabhaiyom śrī taḷippa
viṟṟa nilattukku perunāṉkellai kiḻellai (kiḻellai) putukkuḷattātukku mey niṟkiṉṟa kuṟuppuḷikkun=tarku nokki cempaikku mekku teṉṉellai sabhainilattukku vaṭakkum melel—
Digital edition of SII 25.105 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
